name: drhoney
description: Dr. Honey static site — contracts and CI checks

scripts.lint:json: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; for (const f of ['site.webmanifest','vercel.json']) JSON.parse(readFileSync(f,'utf8')); console.log('json ok')"
scripts.ci: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:json && npm test && npm run test:e2e
